3:
The machinist in the Brume points out the door behind which Joye's father is supposedly being held. Approach the weak-kneed watch, and intimidate him with a Slug Shot.

When Slug Shot is unavailable, Heated Slug Shot may be used instead.

7:
Though Stephanivien is cheered to think that your exploits have further impressed the Holy See, he is also wary of Tedalgrinche's escalating villainy. Practice the new technique passed on to you from Rostnsthal, and remain vigilant for the treachery of House Dzemael.

※The next machinist quest will be available from Stephanivien upon reaching level 56.
